title: Mossy's New Home at River Lake
summary: Disco and Thisco, two moles busy digging a new forest tunnel, encounter an unusual walking piece of moss named Mossy. Struggling with the dry air, Mossy asks the moles for help. After a refreshing spray from a hose, the moles carry Mossy to the damp shores of River Lake. There, Mossy finds a perfect sun-drenched rock and is joined by two new companions: Iza and Frisky, a South American Marcella Moss who made the long journey by airplane. Together, they settle into their new home in the heart of the forest.

highlightQuote.text: I'm South American Marcella Moss... I took an airplane.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Humming and singing]

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, you ready for a new Disco and Thisco story?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now, once upon a time Disco and Thisco were sitting in the forest and they heard a little snuffling sound.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That's Papamoles.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well it wasn't Papamoles, and Disco looked over and said 'Hey, what's that little piece of moss doing over there? Is it moving?'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Thisco said 'No, that couldn't be moss that's moving. Moss just sits there, like on a tree or on a rock.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco said 'No, I think it's a piece of moss that's walking.' And it came over to them.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Must finish that story!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's keep telling the story. So the little piece of moss walked over and it said 'Excuse me, I- I need your help.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what did Disco and Thisco say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dig, dig, dig. Scrumsh, scrumsh, scrumsh.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'What are you doing?' said the piece of moss.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Digging our brand new tunnel.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, a tunnel! That sounds very nice. But can you help me? I have a problem.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. What is it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Well, I'm- I'm, you know, I'm moss, so I'm made of tiny little green shoots all in a little mat. But I really need to be nice and damp, but I'm drying out and it doesn't feel good. Can you help me find some water please?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's water in my hose.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, in the hose?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, my hose. Could you spray me please?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Spraying sounds]

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Ahhh!' And the moss was so happy and it turned even brighter green and it sparkled in the sunlight with tiny little droplets of water all over it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, but there's a nice pond nearby called River Lake. Follow me to where River Lake is.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, could you take me there? Because I don't walk very fast.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, you can pick me up? Thank you.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Here... here's a nice little wet... There's River Lake.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, River Lake! I love it. And now could you find me a beautiful rock with just the right amount of sunlight to lie on? Because that's the kind of new home that I need.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's a rock there. There's moss.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Thank you. And there's one last thing that I need, but it's a much harder thing to get. And that is, I need another moss friend to talk to.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, I got one! I got another rock. I'll place the rock right there next to your rock. Uh-huh. And then I'll place the friend on the rock so now you have a friend to talk to.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the moss said 'Well, my name is Mossy. What's your name?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: My name's Iza.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, hi Iza.' But this new piece of moss, it doesn't seem to be able to talk.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes it is talking.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, what did it say?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It says 'Hello, my name is Frisky.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, Frisky. Nice to meet you. What kind of moss are you?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm South American Marcella Moss.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, South American Marcella Moss. Wow. You must have come a long way to get here. How did you get here?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I took an airplane.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Wow! Well, I made these two new friends over here, Disco and Thisco. Do you want to meet them?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes. Hello Disco and Thisco.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they say 'We're moles, I'm Disco, I'm Thisco.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm reaching for that spirograph.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want to do spirograph.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

characters.name: Mossy
characters.description: A walking piece of moss that searches the forest for a damp home and a companion.

characters.name: Iza
characters.description: A piece of moss who becomes Mossy's first friend on a sunlit rock.

characters.name: Frisky
characters.description: A South American Marcella Moss who traveled a long way by airplane to find a new home.

characters.name: Papamoles
characters.description: A character mentioned during the initial forest encounter.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.

places.name: The New Tunnel
places.description: A construction project started by Disco and Thisco.

places.name: River Lake
places.description: A pond nearby where the moss goes to find moisture.

places.name: The Sunlit Rock
places.description: Mossy’s perfect new home situated right by River Lake.
